core_philosophy: Botanical illustration meets scientific laboratory precision. We avoid generic muddy greens and instead use rich, textured earthy tones layered with crystal glassmorphism for a modern, high-end agritech experience.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#FDFDFB] border border-[#1A3626]/10 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden
surface_strategies.glass_header: bg-[#F5F5F0]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1A3626]/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.drag_drop_zone: bg-[#E8E8E3]/50 border-2 border-dashed border-[#839E88] rounded-2xl p-12 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#E8E8E3] hover:border-[#1A3626]

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A3626] text-[#FDFDFB] px-6 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-[#1A3626]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8E8E3] text-[#1A3626] px-6 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#839E88] hover:text-[#FDFDFB]
buttons.destructive: bg-[#C25E4B] text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-[#A34B3A]

components.inputs: bg-[#FDFDFB] border border-[#839E88]/40 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1A3626] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all
components.badges: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border
components.language_toggle: flex items-center space-x-2 bg-[#E8E8E3] rounded-full p-1

auth_background.description: Abstract macro photography of a green leaf texture overlapping with architectural frosted glass.

empty_state_dashboard.description: Minimalist empty dashboard state background showing a serene sugarcane field with subtle geometric data lines.

sugarcane_field_cover.description: Real image of a sugarcane field in the morning.

sugarcane_leaf_texture.description: Extreme close-up of a vibrant green leaf showcasing intricate patterns and textures.

icons.style: Clean, line-based, stroke-width 1.5, deeply colored in #1A3626 or #839E88.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Configure Tailwind with the specified colors (background, primary, secondary) overriding the default index.css.
Include Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body) via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
Implement language translation context covering EN, HI, MR. Use the language toggle in the header.
Build a sidebar or top nav for Dashboard, History, and Admin pages.
The Dashboard must feature a highly tactile, neumorphic drag-and-drop zone.
The History page must use expandable bento-style cards containing: Disease details, Symptoms, Treatment, Prevention, Products, Admin Suggestions.
The Admin Panel must use the 'Control Room' dense grid for stats (Total Users, Scans, Pending) and tabbed views for managing reviews.
Ensure the Admin review form includes a disease correction dropdown, severity indicator, suggestion textarea, and approve/reject CTA.
Always apply 'data-testid' to interactive elements for end-to-end testing.
Use the generated media URLs for empty states, login background, and placeholders.
